name: How to change the WiFi Roaming parameters in an Android device?
snippet: Open the app drawer and navigate to 'Power Tools' > 'Wi-Fi Radio Settings'. Tap 'Roaming RSSI Threshold'. Enter a value between 45 and 100.

name: How to optimize your Android smartphone's wireless connectivity

name: android.provider.Settings.Global - HCL Software Open Source
snippet:
Global system settings, containing preferences that always apply identically to all defined users. Applications can read these but are not allowed to write.
